name: Cntus-Sungjin Co.,Ltd
summary: Cntus-Sungjin Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells air filters and masks. It offers air filters, such as air cleaner, vacuum cleaner, cabin air, and HVAC filters for air purifiers, automobiles, and other applications; and industrial masks, including disposable particulate masks, half face piece respirators, and particulate filters for industrial applications and regular consumers. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Busan, South Korea.
